settings.text_1: SPECIAL BUNDLE PRICING: Lock in the best value with multi-packs. 🔴Bundle pricing ends in 18 hours.

settings.heading: Why Choose Slowpet™ Lick Bowl
settings.content:
Traditional bowls are empty in seconds — leaving you with messy floors, a bored dog, and nothing to show for that expensive bone broth.

Slowpet's built-in rotating ball changes everything. As your dog licks, the ball spins, releasing treats slowly and keeping them engaged for 20-30 minutes instead of 5 seconds.

No more puddles on your floor. No more gulping and throwing up. No more chewed-up shoes while you're at work. Just a calm, happy dog — and a clean home.

settings.heading: What Can You Put In It
settings.content:
Works with any liquid or semi-liquid treat your dog loves:

  • Bone broth
  • Plain yogurt
  • Pumpkin puree
  • Peanut butter (xylitol-free)
  • Wet dog food

    Pro tip: Freeze it for a longer-lasting challenge — perfect for hot days or when you need extra time.

settings.heading: How to Use
settings.content:
Step 1: Fill the bowl with your dog's favorite treat
Step 2: Place on the floor
Step 3: Relax — your dog is busy for the next 30 minutes

Cleaning: Dishwasher safe (top rack) or hand wash with soap. The ball pops out for easy cleaning.

settings.heading: Shipping & Delivery
settings.content:
Processing time: 1-2 business days
Standard shipping (US): 10-14 business days
International: 10-20 business days

settings.post_text: honestly wasn't expecting much. another pet product, right? but my golden literally won't leave this thing alone. i fill it with bone broth before my morning shower and by the time i'm done, he's still going at it. used to come back to a puddle on the floor every single time. not anymore. this little bowl might be the best $29 i've spent on him since his bed 😭

ok so my frenchie is the FASTEST eater alive. yogurt? gone before i even stand back up. then 10 min later he pukes on the rug. every. time. tried this bowl yesterday and i literally stood there watching him lick for 22 minutes straight. no puke. i'm not exaggerating when i say i teared up a little lol. ordering a second one for my mom's dog

we almost rehomed our dog because of the destruction. shoes, pillows, the couch arm — nothing was safe when we left the house. our trainer said "he needs mental stimulation not more walks." started freezing pumpkin puree in this bowl before we leave. came home today to zero damage for the first time in MONTHS. i literally hugged him and cried. $29 to save my sanity and keep my dog. done.

settings.heading: Will this work for my large/small dog?
settings.row_content: Yes! The bowl works for all breeds and sizes — from Chihuahuas to Golden Retrievers. The 180ml capacity is perfect for enrichment sessions. For larger dogs, just refill if needed.

settings.heading: What treats can I put in it?
settings.row_content: Bone broth, plain yogurt, pumpkin puree, peanut butter (xylitol-free), wet food — any liquid or semi-liquid treat. Freeze it for a longer-lasting challenge.

settings.heading: How long will it keep my dog busy?
settings.row_content: Most dogs stay engaged for 15-30 minutes with liquid treats. Frozen treats can last up to an hour. Way better than the 5 seconds with a regular bowl.

settings.heading: Is the rolling ball a choking hazard?
settings.row_content: No. The ball is securely enclosed inside the bowl and cannot be removed during normal use. Always supervise your dog during first use.

settings.heading: Is it easy to clean?
settings.row_content: Dishwasher safe (top rack). The ball pops out for easy hand washing. We recommend cleaning after each use.

settings.heading: What is it made of?
settings.row_content: 100% food-grade silicone, BPA-free and non-toxic. The same material used in baby products and kitchen tools. Completely safe for daily use.

settings.heading: What if my dog doesn't like it?
settings.row_content: We offer a 90-day money-back guarantee. But most dogs take to it immediately — try starting with peanut butter, it works every time.
